tech_news.title: Apple unveils new accessibility features, and updates with Apple Intelligence - Apple
tech_news.description: Apple announced major accessibility updates powered by Apple Intelligence, including new capabilities for VoiceOver, Magnifier, and Voice Control.

tech_news.title: At last, The Bullet Heaven genre - popularised by hits like Vampire Survivors - has been sanctioned by Steam - Eurogamer
tech_news.description: This update has introduced a variety of new game tags for different genres, which should help categorize upcoming genres.

tech_news.title: Xbox Player Voice requests reveal what fans want most from Microsoft - TrueAchievements
tech_news.description: Xbox fans have wasted no time in submitting feedback to Microsoft with the new Xbox Player Voice portal. Here are the top 10 requests from players.

tech_news.title: Gemini is in danger of going full Copilot - The Verge
tech_news.description: Google is getting ready to launch more Gemini features at I/O 2026. Let’s hope the company learned from Microsoft’s Copilot mistakes.

tech_news.title: Nintendo has just announced Wario Ware-like game Pictonico! for mobile phones, and it looks absolutely bonkers - Eurogamer
tech_news.description: Nintendo's latest surprise announcement is Pictonico! for mobile phones, a Wario Ware-inspired game that's free to start playing but comes with DLC packs.

tech_news.title: Patch Notes 1.29.0 - ARC Raiders
tech_news.description: ARC Raiders is a multiplayer extraction adventure, set in a lethal future earth, ravaged by a mysterious mechanized threat known as ARC.

tech_news.title: Alexa+ now generates podcast episodes on demand - About Amazon
tech_news.description: A new feature creates AI-generated audio episodes on any topic, ready to listen wherever you are.

tech_news.title: LG will release the first 1000Hz, 1080p gaming monitor this year - The Verge
tech_news.description: LG’s 24.5-inch UltraGear 25G590B gaming monitor will be the first 1000Hz 1080p display when it launches in the second half of 2026.

tech_news.description: With iOS 17, Shortcuts may finally become an approachable tool that delivers on its true potential for all users.
